response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of solid software experience but the profile is almost entirely web, full-stack, and GIS work in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang. The role's hard requirements — native Japanese, strong C for UNIX, Linux kernel modification, and embedded networking security (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3, switch firmware) — are essentially absent from the resume. The single C/C++ stint at National Instruments was ~6 months a decade ago and unrelated to embedded networking or security.
strengths: 10+ years of professional software development across diverse stacks
Brief C/C++ exposure building tooling at National Instruments
Strong engineering hygiene: TDD, CI/CD, Linux familiarity
concerns: No evidence of Japanese language ability (required: native-level)
No embedded firmware, switch, or Linux-kernel modification experience
No security-domain background (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal, encryption work)
